commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 123. In connection with this he goes on to say, "O deal with Thy servant according to Thy loving mercy" (ver. 124); not according to my righteousness. "And teach me," he saith, "Thy righteousnesses;" those beyond doubt, whereby God rendereth men righteous, not they themselves.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Mercy. When we have been most diligent, there still remains much to be done, and in many things we offend. (St. Ambrose)
